Perfect Italiano Grated Parmesan Cheese 125g

Grated Parmesan: Authentic texture with bold and distinctive flavour.

Rich, Savoury Flavour: A sharp taste with real bite.

Perfect Finishing Touch: Sprinkle over pasta, risotto or salads.

Grated for Ease: Fine and crumbly.
